subTitle: Ask about service areas, scheduling, maintenance, or landscape installation and get a clear answer from Hawthorn Scapes.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: Hawthorn Scapes serves Boulder through Colorado Springs, including Denver, Littleton, Highlands Ranch, Castle Rock, Centennial, and nearby communities.

faqs.question: Do you offer recurring maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide recurring lawn and landscape maintenance, including mowing, edging, trimming, and seasonal cleanup support.

faqs.question: Can you help with xeriscaping and water-wise planting?
faqs.answer: Yes. We design and install low-water landscapes, drought-tolerant planting beds, and practical hardscape features suited to Colorado conditions.

faqs.question: Do you build retaining walls and fences?
faqs.answer: We do. Hawthorn Scapes handles retaining walls, fencing, and related outdoor structure work as part of complete landscape improvement projects.

faqs.question: How quickly do you respond to quote requests?
faqs.answer: We typically follow up within one business day so we can learn about your project scope, timeline, and property needs.

faqs.question: How can I send a project request?
faqs.answer: Use the contact form on the site, email info@hawthornscapes.com, or call 7208491565 and we will help you with the next step.
